passages.text: Welcome to BhaVi.ai! I am an AI built on Neural Field Intelligence — a new architecture that thinks in continuous fields, not tokens. To teach me knowledge, run: python3 learn.py on your local machine, then python3 export_knowledge.py, then push to GitHub.

BhaVi stands for a five-layer neural architecture: Frozen Core Field (immutable roots), Observer Core (three-zone memory), Curiosity Engine (self-improvement), Superposition Cloud (multiple interpretations), and Collapse Decision (late-binding answers). It runs with only 5 million parameters.

To add knowledge: run python3 learn.py to feed BhaVi books or text, then python3 export_knowledge.py to export, then git push. The site updates automatically with new knowledge from the docs/bhavi_knowledge.json file.
